description: Officer used excessive force during routine traffic stop. Civilian was pulled from vehicle and subjected to unnecessary physical restraint despite compliance.
Officer conducted search of vehicle without proper probable cause or consent. No contraband was found.
Officer stopped civilian without reasonable suspicion. Stop appeared to be based solely on race of driver.
Verbal harassment and intimidation during welfare check. Officer used threatening language without justification.
Arrest made without probable cause. Charges were later dismissed due to lack of evidence.
